analysis_request.user_prompt: Can you analyze the TERT C228T promoter mutation (chr5:1295228 G>A) for effects on TERT expression? This is a recurrent somatic mutation in melanoma and glioblastoma.
notes: Biological context: Horn/Huang 2013 (Science) report that C228T creates a de novo GABPA/ETS binding site and ACTIVATES TERT in melanoma / glioblastoma / bladder cancer. AlphaGenome is trained on bulk tissue where TERT is largely silent, so its CAGE prediction here reflects the endogenous chromatin state (TERT repressed) rather than the cancer-specific reactivation. This example is kept to illustrate how model training data shapes predictions — interpret alongside the published biology.
